title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: November 17, 2022
summary: November 17, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase but at a lower rate from last week, of 4.28% , from the level on 11/10/2022 of 9.370 M km 2 to 9.789 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resources La...
